definition: The winner is value_profile, which uses the CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient to incrementally ratchet input bytes toward an exact comparison constant; adding the I2S stage (value_profile_cmplog) disrupts this gradient climb by introducing corpus pollution, throughput overhead on deep call chains, or whole-operand substitutions that divert the corpus to a competing/neighboring literal rather than the true target.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: Adding I2S to value_profile adds per-execution CmpLog overhead on a deep call chain without delivering the script tag; the CMP_MAP gradient alone in value_profile incrementally approaches the OLD_UYGHUR constant, but the extra I2S cost kills throughput enough to block it.
signature.one_line: I2S overhead on deep call chain overwhelms CMP_MAP gradient

analysis.summary_one_line: A 4-byte script tag matching HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR ('Ougr') must reach the switch so the OLD_UYGHUR case arm fires.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input whose script-tag field is driven to the exact 4-byte FOURCC for HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR so the switch ((hb_tag_t) script) at hb-common.cc:586 dispatches to the case HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR arm at line 652 (true side), returning HB_DIRECTION_RTL.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials (avg 52 hits) within 0.70h; its CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards inputs whose script-tag operand grows closer (matching-prefix length) to the OLD_UYGHUR constant, so havoc bytes that incrementally approach the FOURCC are retained as corpus and the tag is solved without the per-execution cost of the I2S/CmpLog stage.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks the branch in 9/10 trials (avg 0 hits, 22.10h blocked); it adds the per-execution CmpLog buffer + I2SRandReplace stage on top of value_profile, but that extra per-execution cost slows throughput on this deep call chain without delivering the tag, so it never drives the script field to the OLD_UYGHUR constant within budget.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner is value_profile, which has no input-to-state substitution mutator; its enabling technique is the CMP_MAP gradient (matching-prefix / Hamming-distance bucket feedback) that incrementally rewards script-tag bytes approaching the OLD_UYGHUR constant. Adding the I2S+CmpLog stage (the value_profile_cmplog loser) only adds per-execution overhead here, so the divergence is attributable to value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient working unencumbered, not to comparison substitution.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR arm of a switch on the script tag, whose true side returns HB_DIRECTION_RTL.
Dispatch is a switch over the script tag cast to hb_tag_t (a 4-byte FOURCC compare).
value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials while value_profile_cmplog blocks it in 9/10, with the winner hitting the branch and the loser never reaching it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=52  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The winner resolves quickly while the loser stays blocked for the full budget.
value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose CMP operands grow closer to matching, preserving them as corpus.

CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The CMP_MAP distance bucket encodes matching-prefix length for string/memory CMPs, which is the relevant signal for a multi-byte tag compare.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so the winner does not rely on I2S substitution.
value_profile_cmplog (the loser) adds the I2SRandReplace mutator and a per-execution CMP buffer on top of value_profile.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The attribution that I2S+CmpLog per-execution overhead (rather than some other value_profile_cmplog-specific exploration difference) is what blocks the loser is inferred from the cost paragraphs, not directly measured at this branch.

signature.mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient ratchets codepoint bytes toward 0x0E36 via distance-bucket feedback; adding I2S (vpc) diverts mutation/corpus budget away from this gradient climb, so the gradient-only fuzzer reaches the exact constant while vpc cannot.
signature.one_line: I2S disrupts CMP_MAP gradient climb toward exact codepoint 0x0E36

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must place the 32-bit codepoint 0x0E36 (bytes 36 0e 00 00) at a parsed codepoint field so the switch case is taken.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A 4-byte little-endian codepoint field holding exactly 0x0E36 (bytes 36 0e 00 00), so that recategorize_combining_class is called with u==0x0E36 and the switch dispatches to case 0x0E36u at line 51, taking the true side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves all 10 trials and the winner-resolving seeds embed the literal codepoint 36 0e at the parsed field (Seed 1 has 36 0e 00 00 at offset 0x0c; Seed 5 has 36 0e at offset 0x20); the byte-diff at offset 0x36 shows the value 36 concentrated on the W side. value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose comparison operand grows closer (Hamming/prefix bucket) to the constant 0x0E36, climbing the integer-equality gate without needing I2S substitution.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks all 10 trials with hitcount 0 on the branch; the loser-blocking seeds carry other codepoints (e.g. 37 0e, 31 0e, 32 0e, 35 0f) at the codepoint field and never place 0x0E36. Adding the extra input-to-state substitution mutator to value_profile diverts mutation effort/corpus budget away from the CMP_MAP gradient climb that value_profile uses to find 0x0E36, so vpc fails to match the exact constant.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner value_profile is enabled by its CMP_MAP gradient: each integer-CMP callback writes a (PC, operand-distance bucket) entry, so inputs that bring the codepoint operand closer to 0x0E36 register new buckets and are preserved, ratcheting toward the exact match. The loser vpc differs only by also carrying the extra input-to-state substitution stage; that extra technique does not help and the divergence is attributable to value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient-driven match.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S copies space codepoint and unicode-space-class constants (like 0x0020) into the vpc corpus, biasing inputs toward space-classified codepoints that take the != NOT_SPACE true branch; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient instead steers toward valid non-space table-structure inputs reaching the false side.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes space constants, biasing corpus away from false branch

analysis.summary_one_line: Reaching the unicode-space guard with a non-space codepoint there, so space_type==NOT_SPACE takes the false branch; CMP_MAP gradient finds it, I2S substitution diverts vpc into the space-fallback path.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font/buffer input whose current codepoint passes the _hb_glyph_info_is_unicode_space guard at line 191 yet has space_fallback_type == NOT_SPACE at line 194, so the line-195 comparison `space_type != NOT_SPACE` evaluates false. This requires bytes that drive a real glyph-decomposition path (kern/GPOS/GSUB table structure) rather than degenerate ASCII-space runs that resolve to a true space type.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winner-resolving seeds carry structured table tags (kern at offset 0x0c, the 0x00 0x01 0x00 0x00 sfnt-version header) and diverse non-space codepoints; the per-role overlay shows the winner set taking the line-195 false side (W F=16) and the line-196 short-circuit chain, exercising the branch 38 times on average.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocking seeds are dominated by 0x20 (ASCII space) and 0x18 byte runs that resolve to an actual space type, so at line 195 space_type != NOT_SPACE is true (L T=12 F=0) and control diverts into the space-fallback block at 196-202; the loser never lands on the false side, blocking 10/10 trials for 23.9h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner is value_profile, whose CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix distance buckets) rewards inputs that incrementally approach valid table-structure CMPs, steering the corpus toward well-formed non-space glyph inputs that reach line 195 with a non-space codepoint. The loser value_profile_cmplog adds input-to-state substitution, which copies intercepted comparison operands (e.g. the 0x0020 space codepoint compared at line 196 and unicode-space class constants) directly into the input, biasing vpc's corpus toward space-classified codepoints that satisfy line 195's != NOT_SPACE TRUE side and thus block the false branch. So the divergence is attributable to the I2S delta but the technique that *helps* is CMP_MAP gradient on the value_profile arm.

signature.mechanism_summary: The script enum is computed indirectly from font tables; I2S substitution cannot reach it directly and dilutes/pollutes the corpus and energy budget, starving the CMP_MAP gradient that value_profile uses unencumbered to walk toward the OLD_UYGHUR script value.

hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile reaches the true side in all 10 trials with hitcount 26 on the branch; its CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards inputs whose CMP operands move closer to a matching script tag, walking the corpus toward OLD_UYGHUR without an I2S stage diverting energy.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog resolves only 1/10 and is blocked 9/10 at avg 22h, hitting MONGOLIAN/NKO/default instead; its added I2SRandReplace mutator spends mutation energy on direct operand substitution that cannot reach a script enum computed indirectly from font tables, diluting the corpus and starving the CMP_MAP gradient that actually works.

members.function: hb-ot-shaper-indic.cc:initial_reordering_consonant_syllable(hb_ot_shape_plan_t const*, hb_face_t*, hb_buffer_t*, unsigned int, unsigned int)

signature.mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient incrementally builds structured Indic consonant-joiner syllables; adding I2S (vpc) displaces the gradient's incremental corpus growth by inserting whole-operand literal substitutions, disrupting the steady syllable assembly and causing vpc to block.
signature.one_line: I2S literal substitution disrupts CMP_MAP gradient's syllable assembly

analysis.summary_one_line: A multi-glyph Indic consonant syllable with a joiner (ZWJ/ZWNJ) preceded by a consonant, so the ZWJ-effect do-while loop walks back and exits false.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input decoding to an Indic consonant-syllable cluster of multiple glyphs containing a joiner (ZWJ/ZWNJ) at position i>start with a consonant somewhere before it, so the line-937 do-while (decrementing j from the joiner) exits via its false condition because is_consonant(info[j]) becomes true. The seeds are little-endian glyph-index records; the recurring 0c 20 00 00 / 09 00 00 dwords plus 0xa4 bytes encode the Indic glyph stream that set_indic_properties classifies into consonants + joiners.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolved 10/10 with avg 32 hits on the branch; its CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient incrementally rewards inputs whose CMP operands approach the glyph-classification thresholds, building well-formed multi-glyph consonant syllables. Winner seeds carry repeated 0c 20 00 00 and 09 00 00 structural dwords and 0xa4 runs that produce the consonant+joiner stream the loop needs; the loop at 937 is reached and exits false (T=7 F=12 on one count line).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocked 8/10 (resolved 0/10) despite sharing the same CMP_MAP gradient; its extra I2SRandReplace stage substitutes whole CMP operands, displacing the gradient's incremental corpus growth so it rarely assembles the multi-consonant joiner syllable. Loser seeds are shorter, joiner-poor records (e.g. dense 0c 20 00 00 / 47 0c 00 00 dwords) that take the line-937 true side (T=4 F=3) and never satisfy the consonant-before-joiner exit; the enclosing function fires only 2 times for L vs 27 for W.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner value_profile is enabled by the CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance bucket feedback) without input-to-state substitution. The divergence is anti-I2S: the only technique value_profile_cmplog adds over value_profile is the per-execution CmpLog buffer plus input-to-state operand substitution, and that addition HURTS — the literal operand replacement disrupts the steady gradient-driven assembly of the structured Indic syllable. So the technique enabling the winner is CMP_MAP gradient.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of a do-while loop that decrements j until it hits a consonant or start, inside the joiner-effect pass.

signature.mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient walks script-tag/table-magic CMP operands incrementally toward a USE-routed script tag, hitting the line-300 block; value_profile_cmplog's I2S additionally swaps in exact GSUB/GPOS/DFLT/latn literal operands, over-committing the corpus to earlier high-frequency case arms and starving the USE block.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP gradient walks toward USE-routed script; I2S over-commits corpus to earlier literal cases

analysis.summary_one_line: Font input whose resolved script tag falls in the USE-shaper case-block (HB_SCRIPT_PHAGS_PA and the Unicode-5.0+ additions) reaches the blocked case arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font whose parsed script property (planner->props.script) resolves to one of the Unicode-5.0+ scripts handled by the shared USE case block at line 300 (HB_SCRIPT_PHAGS_PA). This requires valid OpenType table magic (e.g. GSUB/GPOS) plus script/script-tag bytes that decode to a USE-routed script rather than DFLT/latn, so the categorize switch lands on the line-300 arm.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winning seeds carry structured table-ish byte runs (e.g. ascii 'darf', repeated 0x06/0x64/0x6e fields and embedded tags like 'h-hans', 'h-min') that drive the script property into the USE case block; the W-only overlay marks line 300 and the entire downstream USE block (lines 303-398) as hit, and the branch averages 34 hits for the winner.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocking seeds are dominated by literal magic-table tokens 'GSUB'/'GPOS' at offset 0x0c with long 0x20/0x5a/0x47 filler runs; they resolve to scripts handled by earlier arms (the L-only overlay hits the Indic/Telugu block at 231-244 and the Myanmar block at 249-262, never line 300), so the loser blocks on this branch in 9/10 trials with 0 hits.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner value_profile uses the CMP_MAP gradient: each script-tag / table-magic CMP writes a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket, and an input that is one bucket closer to a USE-routed script tag is preserved, letting the corpus incrementally walk the operand toward the line-300 USE block. The loser value_profile_cmplog additionally carries the input-to-state comparison-substitution mutator (the only technique delta), which swaps whole CMP operands toward the nearest matching literal (the GSUB/GPOS magic and the DFLT/latn anchor arms), over-committing the corpus to the earlier high-frequency literal case arms and starving exploration of the line-300 USE case; thus the gradient-only fuzzer wins. The winner-enabling technique is the CMP_MAP gradient, not the comparison-substitution mutator.

analysis.summary_one_line: Script tag must equal a Unicode-14/15 USE-shaper value (Old Uyghur/Tangsa/Toto/Vithkuqi/Kawi/Nag Mundari) to take the switch case at line 380.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte script tag dispatched by the switch on (hb_tag_t) planner->props.script must hold one of the Unicode-14.0/15.0 values whose case-arm falls through to line 380 (HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR and siblings). The winner inputs supply a short header whose leading bytes (e.g. 75 0f 01 / 88 0f 01 / 80 0f 01 at offsets 0x00-0x02) drive props.script into that USE-shaper case group rather than the default/DFLT/latn arms.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winner seeds carry a concentrated low-byte head pattern at offsets 0x00-0x02 (75/88/80 then 0f then 01) and are short (10-73 bytes); the CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards each input whose script-tag CMP operand gets closer to a target case constant, ratcheting props.script into the Old Uyghur case so the true branch is hit 26 times.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog loser seeds are large (56-323 bytes) well-formed-looking sfnt tables beginning 00 01 00 00 with GSUB/GPOS directory tags; they resolve a chosen_script of DFLT/latn or an earlier (lower-Unicode) script case, never reaching the line-380 case group, and stay blocked for 22.10h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix distance-bucket feedback on the switch-dispatch CMP) incrementally rewards inputs whose script-tag operand approaches a line-380 case constant. The loser adds an input-to-state substitution stage on top, but that extra substitution diverts the mutation budget toward solving the GSUB/GPOS table-tag comparisons (the only literals it can lift from the corpus), pulling it away from the script-tag dispatch; the winning technique here is the CMP_MAP gradient, not the substitution stage.

members.source_line: default:	    return NOT_SPACE;	/* U+1680 OGHAM SPACE MARK */

signature.mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient accumulates diverse unicode-space codepoints without forcing exact equality; value_profile_cmplog's I2S substitution rewrites the switch comparand u with the exact case-literal operands (0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006), collapsing every space input onto enumerated cases and starving the default arm.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP gradient preserves diverse space codepoints reaching default; I2S collapses them onto enumerated cases

analysis.summary_one_line: A unicode-space codepoint u that is NOT any enumerated case literal (0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006...) so the switch falls to default.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input whose decoded codepoint u reaches space_fallback_type but does NOT equal any enumerated switch case literal (0x0020, 0x00A0, 0x2000, 0x2006, 0x3000, ...), so the switch on u takes the `default:` arm at line 224 instead of a `case` arm.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the default arm in 10/10 trials with hitcount 38 and W reaches line 224 ([W] 224, d=1 L 224 W=T:16/F:1); its CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards producing unicode-space codepoints that route into space_fallback_type, but lacking I2SRandReplace it is not snapped onto the exact case literals, so non-enumerated space codepoints survive in the corpus and trip the default arm.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks the default arm in 10/10 trials with hitcount 0; its I2SRandReplace mutator substitutes the switch comparand u with the exact literal operands of the case comparisons (0x0020, 0x00A0, 0x2006 are exactly the cases its loser seeds land on, [L] 225/226/233, d=1 L 225/226/233), driving every space input onto an enumerated `case` and away from `default`.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The single technique delta is I2S, present in the loser and absent in the winner. value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback lets it accumulate diverse unicode-space codepoints without forcing exact equality matches; the loser's added input-to-state substitution rewrites u with the exact case-literal operands seen in the switch comparisons, collapsing inputs onto enumerated cases and starving the default arm. The winner's enabling technique is therefore CMP_MAP gradient exploration unhampered by literal-snapping.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged operands into the corpus, diverting mutation energy toward sibling encoding magic constants (e.g. UTF16BE), so the loser resolves a different gate rather than assembling the UCS4_2143 00 00 3C 00 window; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient climbs toward it without that diversion.
signature.one_line: 4-byte UCS4_2143 magic; I2S diverts corpus to sibling encoding gates

analysis.summary_one_line: First 4 input bytes consumed by xmlDetectCharEncoding must equal the UCS4_2143 magic prefix 0x00 0x00 0x3C 0x00.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte window read by xmlDetectCharEncoding(start, 4) must hold exactly in[0]==0x00, in[1]==0x00, in[2]==0x3C, in[3]==0x00 (the UCS4_2143 magic) while NOT matching any earlier 4-byte encoding gate (e.g. 00 00 00 3C for UCS4BE) tested before line 958.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the true side in 9/10 trials; its CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose CMP operands move bucket-by-bucket toward the 00 00 3C 00 constant, and winner-resolving seeds carry runs of 0x00 bytes (e.g. offsets 0x15-0x17 = 00 00 00) that the gradient feedback assembled into the magic prefix.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks the true side in 8/10 trials and spends 18.00h blocked; adding the I2SRandReplace stage diverts mutation energy into splicing logged operands, and the loser-blocking seeds instead resolve the sibling UTF16BE gate (line 980, tagged [L]) so they never present the 00 00 3C 00 window to line 958.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance bucket feedback) lets it climb toward the 4-byte magic constant incrementally; value_profile_cmplog adds the input-to-state substitution stage which here diverts effort and the pair regresses, so this is an I2S-hurts case where the winning technique is the CMP_MAP gradient, not comparison-solving substitution.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The dataflow link between the 0x00 runs in winner seeds and the precise 4-byte detection window is inferred from byte content, not directly traced through the start[] buffer fill at the call site.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged exact-literal comparands ('<![CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE') back into the corpus, biasing seeds toward completing those multi-byte gates and the CDATA state machine rather than taking the false-side general-parse path; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient diversifies content leads without that pull.
signature.one_line: 9-byte CDATA literal AND-chain false side; I2S biases corpus toward CDATA entry

analysis.summary_one_line: Resolving the false side needs content bytes that are NOT a full '<![CDATA[' literal, reached by broad parsing progress rather than exact-literal CDATA matching

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A '<'-led content byte stream whose bytes 1-8 do NOT spell '![CDATA[' (or a non-'<' content lead), so the 9-clause AND at L11747-11754 short-circuits to its false side and the parser keeps advancing through general START_TAG / CONTENT parsing instead of entering the CDATA-section state machine.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in 9/10 trials; its winning seed reaches the false-side START_TAG path ([W] lines 11604-11620 and the goto-done at 11500/11639) and never enters the [L] CDATA-section block, meaning the 8-byte CDATA literal was not matched so the false side was taken.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks 8/10; its loser seed funnels into the [L] '<?xml' declaration and '<!DOCTYPE' / CDATA-section paths (L11555-11591, L11813-11903, L11950-11984), spending energy completing exact multi-byte literal matches and the CDATA term scan rather than diversifying content to take the false side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile (winner) uses CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient feedback over edge coverage and lacks the input-to-state substitution mutator; it explores diverse content leads and rides the false side. value_profile_cmplog adds the input-to-state substitution mutator, which splices logged comparands (e.g. the '<![CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE' literals it intercepts) back into the input, biasing its corpus toward completing those exact-literal gates and the CDATA state machine — diverting energy away from the false-side general-parse progress. The delta is I2S and the winner is the no-I2S variant, so the winner's progress is driven by CMP_MAP gradient feedback while I2S is a net liability here, not an asset.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of an 8-deep per-byte AND chain matching the literal '<![CDATA['.
The decisive pair is value_profile beating value_profile_cmplog with the technique delta being I2S.
The winner resolves the branch in 9/10 trials while the loser blocks in 8/10.
The winner-only path takes the START_TAG general-parse branch off the CDATA gate's false side.
The loser-only path enters the CDATA-section state machine (the true side of the literal gate).
The loser also spends energy on the '<?xml' declaration exact-literal path that the winner does not.
value_profile uses CMP_MAP gradient feedback and has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the value_profile feature set.
The loser invokes the CDATA literal-check and lookup-string functions that the winner barely touches, evidencing wasted effort on the structured-literal paths.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same 8-byte CDATA literal gate where adding I2SRandReplace to value_profile makes the false-side branch resolve EQUALLY FAST or FASTER (no penalty), showing I2S is not diverting energy from false-side progress.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Whether I2S substitution in vpc actively diverts energy (corpus pollution) versus the divergence being noise/variance is not directly proven; the byte diff shows the two seeds are structurally unrelated rather than a single offset flip, so the dataflow story rests on path-coverage inference, not a clean byte-level contrast.
